storyboard.content: I'm having severe crushing chest pain that started suddenly 90 minutes ago while I was sitting at my desk.
The pain radiates to my left arm and jaw.
I'm sweating heavily and feel very short of breath.
I feel nauseated and dizzy and my heart is racing.
The pain started suddenly 90 minutes ago and has not improved at all since then.
The chest pain is about a 9 out of 10 and I feel like something terrible is happening.
I'm a 52-year-old man who is overweight, smokes, and has a family history of heart disease.
